name: x-mcp-server
description: Connect Claude to Twitter/X via browser automation — no API key needed
long_description:
# Twitter Bridge MCP

Connect Claude to your Twitter/X account using browser automation via the Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP). No Twitter API key required.

## Prerequisites

1. **bb-browser** must be installed. Set `BB_BROWSER_PATH` if it's not at `~/local/bin/bb-browser`.
2. **Chrome** must be running with remote debugging enabled:
   ```
   /Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google\ Chrome \
     --remote-debugging-port=9222 \
     --user-data-dir=$HOME/chrome-mcp-profile
   ```
3. Log in to Twitter/X in that Chrome instance before using the tools.

## Configuration

Set environment variables via the MCP server config or a `.env` file:
- `BB_BROWSER_PATH` — path to bb-browser binary (default: `~/local/bin/bb-browser`)
- `CDP_PORT` — Chrome remote debugging port (default: `9222`)
- `DM_PIN` — 4-digit PIN for DM unlock screen (optional)

tools.name: twitter_undo
tools.description: Undo an action: unlike, unretweet, or delete tweet

tools.name: twitter_quote
tools.description: Quote tweet — posts on your timeline with embedded tweet card

tools.name: twitter_my_replies
tools.description: Get your own replies to other tweets

tools.name: twitter_mentions
tools.description: Get mentions and replies to your tweets

tools.name: twitter_view_tweet
tools.description: View a tweet with full details and image URLs
